rule_metadata.author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson, Axel Olsson
rule_metadata.title: Sensitive File Upload

rules.rule_text:
title: Sensitive File Upload
id: 44a88643-7ccc-4893-be1e-ed19a26e4888
description: Detects upload of potentially sensitive files known to be targets for
  exfiltration
status: stable
author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson, Axel Olsson
date: 2024-08-13
modified: 2024-09-08
logsource:
  product: zscaler
  service: zia
detection:
  selection:
  - file_name:
    - SYSTEM
    - SYSTEM.dat
    - SECURITY
    - SECURITY.dat
    - SAM
    - SAM.dat
    - NTUSER
    - NTUSER.dat
    - lock.json
    - shock.json
    - barrel.json
    - barrel.zip
  - file_name|contains:
    - ntds.dit
    - lsass.dmp
    - lsass.exe.dmp
    - .kirbi
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
tags:
- mitre.exfiltration
